title: A great tennis match is all about reading the game. The same goes for sponsorship performance. 🤖  During the @atptour in Shanghai, every camera angle, court transition, and replay created new opportunities for brands to capture attention. The challenge isn’t just being present. It’s knowing which placements truly delivered impact.
